What We Offer

BUILT FOR
OBSESSION

Wash
Basic Wash
Quick exterior clean — removes dirt, dust, and surface grime. Back to its best in no time.
Wash
Basic Glow
Exterior wash + hand wax polish. Brings out the true finish — and keeps it glowing for days.
Detailing
Interior Detail
Leather treatment, deep vacuum, dashboard wipe-down, and odor elimination. Like new inside.
Detailing
Glass Detail
Crystal-clear visibility. Water repellent coating + streak-free clean inside and out.
★ Most Popular
Coating
Ceramic Coat
Professional nano-ceramic protection. 3–5 year durability, hydrophobic finish, showroom depth.
Detailing
Engine Detail
Engine bay degreasing and thorough cleaning. Under the hood — as clean as the outside.
Full Package
Car Care Deluxe
Interior, exterior, glass, engine, and tires — the complete care experience in one appointment.
Coating
Graphene Coat
Next-level graphene technology. Superior heat dissipation, slicker surface, longer lasting protection.

Why Thunder Auto

WHY
TRUST US

01

WE COME
TO YOU

No driving to a shop. No waiting in lines. Book a time that works for you, and our fully-equipped team arrives at your doorstep — ready to work. Your schedule stays uninterrupted.

0

8km

02

ON TIME,
EVERY TIME

We respect your time like we respect your car. Our team arrives within the booked window — no delays, no excuses. Precision service from the first minute of contact.

98%
On-time arrival rate
Mon–Fri
8AM – 6PM
03

PRO-GRADE
EQUIPMENT

We don't show up with cheap products. Our rig is fully equipped with professional-grade tools, premium detailing products, and the same gear used by certified shops — brought directly to you.

100%
Pro-grade products
Fully
Self-contained rig

SATISFACTION
GUARANTEED

Not happy with the result? We'll make it right — no questions asked. Our work is backed by a satisfaction guarantee because we believe you should only pay for results you're proud to drive.

100%
Satisfaction guarantee
0
Unresolved complaints

INSURED

Your vehicle is in safe hands. We're fully insured for every service we perform. That means peace of mind isn't just a promise — it's a policy. Drive clean. Drive covered.
